idea-plugin.name: Binder
idea-plugin.description:
Language support for Binder — a local-first knowledge base with bidirectional Markdown sync.

Features

  • Autocomplete for link references, field names, and valid option values
  • Hover docs with field descriptions and allowed values
  • Go to definition for referenced entities
  • Inlay hints showing referenced entity titles inline
  • Code actions and quick fixes for invalid field values
  • Real-time diagnostics against your schema
  • Automatic sync on save

Requirements

  • Binder CLI installed and available in PATH
  • A Binder workspace (contains a .binder directory)
Configure the CLI path at Settings > Tools > Binder.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Autocomplete for link references, field names, and valid option values
  • Hover docs with field descriptions and allowed values
  • Go to definition for referenced entities
  • Inlay hints showing referenced entity titles inline
  • Code actions and quick fixes for invalid field values
  • Real-time diagnostics against your schema
  • Automatic sync on save
  • Configurable Binder executable path via Settings > Tools > Binder
